\tzpentry{ID3665}{Quantum Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3665 introduces Quantum Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mathcal{R}_{\mu\nu}^{\text{quantum}} &= \frac{\hbar G}{c^5} \langle \{\nabla_{\mu}, \nabla_{\nu}\} S_{\text{vN}}[\rho]\rangle \\ \mathcal{L}_{\text{decoherence}}[\rho] &= \sum_k \gamma_k(L_k\rho L_k^{\dagger} - \frac{1}{2}\{L_k^{\dagger}L_k,\rho\}) \\ \mathcal{B}_{\text{gravity}}[\rho,g] &= \frac{G}{c^3}\int K(x-x')[T_{\mu\nu}(x'),[T^{\mu\nu}(x),\rho]] \, d^3x' \end{align}
